name: Thaipusam
traditions: Kavadi (burden-bearing) rituals with body piercings; milk pot carrying; shaving heads; chariot processions; prayers to Lord Murugan.
historicalBackground: Thaipusam honors Lord Murugan receiving a divine spear (Vel) from Goddess Parvati to vanquish evil. The festival emphasizes penance and devotion.
description: A Hindu Tamil festival of devotion to Lord Murugan, famous for its dramatic kavadi rituals and processions at Batu Caves, Malaysia.
